milestone_brief: Close F-L1 from enriques-hq-smoothing-2026q3-e1 (deferred). Rename the user-facing "HQ smoothing" label to "Double-pass smooth". The frontend-ux critic flagged "HQ" as marketing-tone / opaque; "Double-pass smooth" is descriptive (the feature applies a second Taubin smoothing pass after the first). Scope: appearance_panel.py button label + tooltip + nearby comments; app.py status-bar template variables that interpolate "[HQ]" or "HQ"; tests/test_enriques_hq_smoothing.py + tests/test_styles_palette.py source-text assertions that grep for "HQ smoothing"; CONTEXT.md §4.3a + §8.16 doc references. AI-15 honesty check: "Double-pass smooth" is technically accurate — the implementation runs exactly two Taubin passes (n_iter=20+40). Internal symbol names (hq_smoothing, _hq_smoothing_cb, set_hq_smoothing_eligible, hq_smoothing_changed, HQ_SMOOTHING_ICON_NAME, _HQ_SMOOTHING_ELIGIBLE_SUBTYPES) can stay as-is to avoid blast-radius churn — only USER-VISIBLE strings rename. Test for both the new label appearing and the old label not appearing (regression guard).
research_synthesis: Pure label rename, ~25 LOC. appearance_panel.py:265 button label + tooltip phrase; app.py:660 status-bar _hq_label suffix + 2 comment updates; 3 existing test assertion updates + 4 new regression-guard tests; CONTEXT.md prose updates. Internal symbols (_hq_smoothing, _hq_smoothing_cb, set_hq_smoothing_eligible, hq_smoothing_changed, HQ_SMOOTHING_ICON_NAME, _HQ_SMOOTHING_ELIGIBLE_SUBTYPES, _hq_label var name) STAY per brief. AI-15 attestation: Double-pass smooth is honest — exactly 2 Taubin passes (n_iter=20+40). All 15 invariants green.
